[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001000 2
1 010000000 1
2 100010010 3
3 001100001 3
4 001000101 3
5 110111100 6
6 001110011 5
7 111110110 7
